case_title: MORIERA PEDRO J VS CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY MORIERA PEDRO J AS TO DEFENDANT CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
INVALID SERVICE AS TO CITY TOW, NO DESCRIPTION OF PARTY SERVED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORIERA PEDRO J IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY TOW DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECT IN SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
